---
author: 'Dareh Gregorian, Ryan J. Reilly, Gary Grumbach'
cover_image: >-
  https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_nbcnews-fp-1200-630,f_auto,q_auto:best/rockcms/2025-09/250926-james-comey-rs-509c8a.jpg
date: '2026-04-29T01:24:03.040Z'
dateFolder: 2026/04/28
description: >-
  The Justice Department says former FBI Director James Comey threatened to kill
  the president. But experts told NBC News his Instagram post showing seashells
  assembled to read "8647" shouldn't have resulted in charges.
isBasedOn: >-
  https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/justice-department/legal-experts-shellshocked-new-comey-indictment-rcna342583
link: >-
  https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/justice-department/legal-experts-shellshocked-new-comey-indictment-rcna342583
slug: >-
  2026-04-28-httpswwwnbcnewscompoliticsjustice-departmentlegal-experts-shellshocked-new-comey-indictment-rcna342583
tags:
  - politics
  - law and order
title: Legal experts shellshocked over new Comey indictment
---
<p>“Maybe it’ll<a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/justice-department/james-comey-back-trumps-crosshairs-time-different-rcna207635"> go away</a>,” James Comey said last May of an investigation into his Instagram post showing seashells arranged on a beach in the shape of the numbers “8647.”</p>
